prompt: Write a tailored statement of purpose for the Edinburgh dexterous-manipulation PhD position with Professor O'Keefe.

assertions.text: Follows an SOP arc (opening, trajectory, why-this-lab, goals)
Names O'Keefe's specific work / open problems
Uses only real CV material (88%/UR5/CoRL workshop)
Handles the tactile gap honestly (doesn't claim tactile experience)
